# HiTech Globals

> Remote-first digital agency specializing in web development, mobile apps, e-commerce, and custom software solutions.

## About

HiTech Globals is a digital agency that helps businesses build exceptional digital products. We are a remote-first team available 24/7, working with clients worldwide to transform their ideas into reality.

## Services

- Web Development (React, Next.js, Vue, Angular)
- Mobile App Development (React Native, Flutter)
- E-Commerce Solutions (Shopify, Custom)
- UI/UX Design
- Brand Design
- Custom Software Development
- API Development
- Cloud Solutions

## Technologies

React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Vercel, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion

## Location

Remote-first, India-based team serving clients worldwide.
